tagline: The #1 staffing franchise in a $179B US market with 40 years of proven unit economics and built-in recession resilience.
description_short: A full-time owner-operator staffing franchise requiring brick-and-mortar presence and strong B2B sales leadership. Mature offices (24+ months) average $5.3M in annual sales with the franchisor handling all back-office payroll and AR functions. Investment thesis centers on high AUV a deeply proven model and structural demand for contingent labor in any economic cycle.
market_intelligence_insight: The US staffing market reached $178.9B in 2025 with 2% growth forecast for 2026 per SIA; global staffing projected at $650B with a 7.2% CAGR through 2030 driven by employer demand for workforce flexibility and the ongoing normalization of contingent labor.
item_19_headline: First-year offices averaged $999949 in annual sales; mature offices open 60+ months averaged $5775277 in FY2025.
ongoing_support: regional field coaching,back-office and payroll processing,toll-free assistance center,marketing campaigns,sales training,PR assistance,ongoing education,technology support
